mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM cat_dynamic_form_field WHERE form_id = #{formId}
AND version = #{version}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cat_dynamic_form_field (id, form_id, group_id, version, field_id, title, type, required, default_value, placeholder, options, min_length, max_length, min, max, pattern, pattern_tips, span, deleted, create_by, create_time, update_time, sort) SELECT REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), form_id, group_id, #{targetVersion}, field_id, title, type, required, default_value, placeholder, options, min_length, max_length, min, max, pattern, pattern_tips, span, '0', create_by, NOW(), NOW(), sort FROM cat_dynamic_form_field WHERE form_id = #{formId} AND version = #{sourceVersion} AND deleted = '0'
